  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Rebar mat is resting directly on the dirt/subgrade without chairs, bolsters, or concrete blocks (dobies)."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Lift the rebar mat and install approved chairs or concrete blocks to achieve the required concrete cover.",
    "Ensure minimum concrete cover of 3 inches is maintained where concrete is cast against and permanently exposed to earth per ACI 318."
  ],
  "rationale": "The rebar mat is resting directly on the ground, which violates ACI 318 requirements for concrete cover over reinforcement cast against earth. This will lead to corrosion and structural failure if concrete is poured in this state. The work is considered 70% complete but fails inspection until proper supports are installed.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 318 Section 20.6.1.3.1 (Concrete cover for multidirectional reinforcement cast against and permanently in contact with earth)",
    "ACI 117 (Standard Specifications for Tolerances for Concrete Construction and Materials)"
  ]
}
